infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SnapWild needs camera access so Vanya can identify wildlife for you.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SnapWild needs photo library access to identify animals from your gallery.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SnapWild saves your catch location so you can see it on your personal map.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: SnapWild counts your steps while you explore nature outdoors.
